title: Our Team
subtitle: Meet the experts behind CEC Nepal's success

joinTeam.title: Join Our Team
joinTeam.description: We're always looking for talented engineers and consultants passionate about clean energy.

members.name: Mr. Mani Raj Dahal
members.education: MSc Hydraulic Engineering & River Basin Development (IHE Delft, Netherlands), BE Civil Engineering (IOE Pulchowk)
members.experience: 26+ years in hydropower sector, technical consultant for numerous hydropower projects
members.bio: Founder and Director of Clean Energy Consultants Pvt. Ltd., one of Nepal's leading hydropower consultancy firms with extensive expertise in hydropower development and technical consultancy.

members.name: Er. Santosh Dhakal
members.experience: 20+ years as Electrical Engineer and Electromechanical Expert at CEC, 60+ hydropower projects designed
members.bio: Board Director at Clean Energy Consultants since mid-2006. Has led the electrical and electromechanical design for approximately 60 hydropower projects with several more under feasibility and detailed design stages. Currently working with Hydro Tasmania, Australia.

members.name: Mr. Narayan Poudel
members.experience: Extensive professional experience in finance and project financial analysis
members.bio: Finance Director at Clean Energy Consultants Pvt. Ltd. Leads financial feasibility studies, project financial analysis, and overall financial assessment for hydropower projects. Also serves as Finance Director for Aayu Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and Chairman of Finman Services Pvt. Ltd.

members.name: Er. Kosa Raj Chapagain
members.experience: 15+ years as Senior Civil Engineer and Project Manager at CEC
members.bio: Project Director and Board Member at Clean Energy Consultants since mid-2011. Brings extensive expertise in feasibility studies, detailed design, and project monitoring. Responsible for overseeing major hydropower project implementations and technical delivery.

assignments.staffDesignation: Cost and Construction Quality Control Expert

members.name: Dr. Chhatra Basnet
members.education: PhD Rock Mechanics (NTNU Norway), MSc Hydropower Development (NTNU Norway), BE Civil (IOE Pulchowk)
members.experience: 18+ years at Clean Energy Consultants Pvt. Ltd., strategic leadership and innovation
members.bio: Chief Executive Officer with 18 years of pivotal experience at Clean Energy Consultants Pvt. Ltd. Dr. Basnet has shaped the company's strategic direction, driving innovation and sustainable engineering practices in the hydropower sector. Leads organizational vision and technical excellence.

members.name: Dr. Bishnu Raj Baral
members.education: PhD Sediment (QMUL, UK), MSc Hydraulic Engineering and Sediment Transport (IHE Delft, Netherlands), BE Civil (IOE, Pulchowk)
members.experience: 5 years international research (UK, Italy, Netherlands), 18+ years hydropower consulting

members.name: Mr. Ghan Bahadur Shrestha
members.experience: Major national projects: Nalsing Gad (410 MW), Melamchi Water Supply, Kabeli-3 (49 MW), Upper Chameliya (40 MW)
members.bio: Geological and geophysical expert with specialized expertise in geological mapping, geophysical surveys, drilling supervision, GIS, and remote sensing. Extensive experience on significant national hydropower projects. Brings critical earth science expertise to complex feasibility and design phases.

assignments.staffDesignation: Sr. Geologist / RS & GIS / Tunneling & Geophysics Expert
